mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id, u.user_nm, u.pswd_hash, u.ognz_id, o.ognz_se_cd, op.oprtr_id, vi.vrfcn_inst_id, u.acnt_lock_yn, u.master_yn FROM com.tn_user u JOIN com.tn_ognz o ON o.ognz_id = u.ognz_id AND NOW() BETWEEN o.use_bgng_dt AND o.use_end_dt LEFT JOIN com.tn_oprtr op ON op.ognz_id = u.ognz_id AND NOW() BETWEEN op.use_bgng_dt AND op.use_end_dt LEFT JOIN com.tn_vrfcn_inst vi ON vi.ognz_id = u.ognz_id AND NOW() BETWEEN vi.use_bgng_dt AND vi.use_end_dt WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND NOW() BETWEEN u.use_bgng_dt AND u.use_end_dt
SELECT urm.role_id FROM com.tn_user_role_mpng urm WHERE urm.user_id = #{userId} AND NOW() BETWEEN urm.use_bgng_dt AND urm.use_end_dt

SELECT DISTINCT p.api_path_prefix FROM com.tn_user_role_mpng urm JOIN com.tn_sys_authrt_role_mpng arm ON arm.role_id = urm.role_id AND NOW() BETWEEN arm.use_bgng_dt AND arm.use_end_dt JOIN com.tn_sys_authrt_prgrm_mpng apm ON apm.authrt_id = arm.authrt_id AND NOW() BETWEEN apm.use_bgng_dt AND apm.use_end_dt AND apm.inq_authrt_yn = 'Y' JOIN com.tn_prgrm p ON p.prgrm_id = apm.prgrm_id AND NOW() BETWEEN p.use_bgng_dt AND p.use_end_dt WHERE urm.user_id = #{userId} AND NOW() BETWEEN urm.use_bgng_dt AND urm.use_end_dt

SELECT DISTINCT p.api_path_prefix FROM com.tn_user_role_mpng urm JOIN com.tn_sys_authrt_role_mpng arm ON arm.role_id = urm.role_id AND NOW() BETWEEN arm.use_bgng_dt AND arm.use_end_dt JOIN com.tn_sys_authrt_prgrm_mpng apm ON apm.authrt_id = arm.authrt_id AND NOW() BETWEEN apm.use_bgng_dt AND apm.use_end_dt AND apm.inpt_authrt_yn = 'Y' JOIN com.tn_prgrm p ON p.prgrm_id = apm.prgrm_id AND NOW() BETWEEN p.use_bgng_dt AND p.use_end_dt WHERE urm.user_id = #{userId} AND NOW() BETWEEN urm.use_bgng_dt AND urm.use_end_dt
mapper.update: UPDATE com.tn_user SET pswd_fail_cnt = pswd_fail_cnt + 1, acnt_lock_yn = CASE WHEN pswd_fail_cnt + 1 >= 5 THEN 'Y' ELSE acnt_lock_yn END, last_chg_dt = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE com.tn_user SET pswd_fail_cnt = 0, last_chg_dt = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE com.tn_user SET last_logn_dt = NOW(), last_chg_dt = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE com.tn_user SET acnt_lock_yn = 'Y', last_chg_dt = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO com.th_logn_hstry (user_id, try_dt, logn_rslt_cd, fail_rsn, ip_addr, user_agent) VALUES (#{userId}, NOW(), #{logn_rslt_cd}, #{fail_rsn}, #{ip_addr}, #{user_agent})
